commands.description: Inspect HTTP response headers of any URL

commands.description: Test a regex pattern against a string

commands.description: Scan common ports on a host (non-intrusive)

commands.description: Network ping to measure latency to a host

commands.description: Make a GET/POST HTTP request and see the response

commands.name: hosting
commands.description: Look up hosting provider info for a domain/IP

commands.name: pageinfo
commands.description: Extract meta title, description, OG tags from a page

commands.description: Detect technologies used on a website (CMS, framework, CDN)

commands.description: Minify HTML, CSS, or JavaScript code
